extension.name: Abhyasa Custody Transfer
extension.description: Deliver-or-report custody transfer of governance obligations over unreliable agent channels. Carries admissible obligations under custody (AB-1..AB-4) so each is applied, declined, or escalated — never silently lost.

KindProfile.description:
Per-kind custody delivery profile inside an :class:`AbhyasaServiceRef`.

Custody is a cross-cutting concern, so the delivery profile is declared once
per governance *kind* an agent carries under custody — not duplicated into
each domain protocol's own AgentCard block. Each kind tunes its own
deadline (e.g. a Phala corrective update at 24 h, an Anumati consent at 1 h).

obligation_endpoint.description: HTTPS URL where obligations of this kind are POSTed under custody.
obligation_endpoint.title: Obligation Endpoint

deadline_seconds.description: AB-1 custody deadline for this kind.
deadline_seconds.title: Deadline Seconds

max_retries.description: AB-2 retransmission bound; MUST be large enough that the capped exponential backoff spans deadline_seconds (the deadline, not the retry count, is the binding terminator).
max_retries.title: Max Retries

backoff.description: Retry backoff strategy. Only 'exponential' is defined in v1.
backoff.title: Backoff

backoff_cap_seconds.description: Backoff cap; kept below the deadline so several attempts fall within it.
backoff_cap_seconds.title: Backoff Cap Seconds

KindProfile.title: KindProfile

agent_card_payload_schema.description:
Abhyasa-specific fields contributed to an A2A AgentCard.

Validators detect Abhyasa support by the presence of an entry in
``capabilities.extensions[]`` whose ``uri`` equals ``ABHYASA_EXTENSION_URI``.
The body of that entry SHOULD deserialize to this model. The custody layer is
advertised once per agent: the agent-level ``custody_ack_endpoint`` plus one
:class:`KindProfile` per governance kind carried under custody. Domain
protocols (Phala, Anumati, OAuth, ...) carry no custody fields of their own.

version.description: Abhyasa protocol semver this agent implements (e.g. '1.0.0').
version.title: Version

custody_ack_endpoint.description: Agent-level HTTPS URL where this agent (as custodian) receives asynchronous CustodyAcks for the deferred discharge path.
custody_ack_endpoint.title: Custody Ack Endpoint

supported_kinds.description: Per-kind custody delivery profiles; one entry per governance kind this agent carries under custody.
supported_kinds.title: Supported Kinds

agent_card_payload_schema.title: AbhyasaServiceRef

invariants: AC-1: an obligation is admissible iff it declares a fail-safe polarity safe(O).
AB-1: an admissible obligation MUST be delivered under custody until applied/declined or deadline.
AB-2: on timeout the custodian MUST retry under bounded exponential backoff up to max_retries.
AB-3: a receiver MUST apply an obligation at most once, keyed on obligation_id.
AB-4: on deadline without applied/declined, execute safe(O) on principal-side state and escalate.
